For Hearing On Defendant Tariq Ayyad'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jak Marquez, Esq., Beckman Marquez (415) 495-8500 for Defendant and Moving Party Ayyad
Judith Rentschler, Esq. (650) 524-1980 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Jaron
RULING:
Adonis Asintewa is not present; under subpoena. HEARING HELD: Tiraq Ayyad and Seymour Jaron, sworn and examined. Evidentiary evidence marked for identification. A R G U E D; the Court finds Defendant Tiraq Ayyad is not entitled to the relief requested pursuant to CCP 473. DEFENDANT TARIQ AYYAD'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is DENIED. Exhibits are returned. Fees are imposed pursuant to GC 68086ff and CRC 892. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Off Calendar Aug-03-2004 Off Calendar

For Hearing On Defendant Tariq Ayyad'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-28-2004 Continued To Aug-13-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jak Marquez, Esq., Beckman & Marquez LLP (415) 495-8500 for Defendant and Moving Party Ayyad
Judith J. Rentschler, Esq., Rentschler/Tursi LLP (650) 524-1980 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Jaron
RULING:
DEFENDANT TARIQ AYYAD'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is CONTINUED to 08/13/04 in Dept. 301 at 9:30 AM. Tariq Ayyad, Adonis Asintewa and Seymour Laron are ordered to appear in Court to testify under oath and subject to cross examination at that time. A failure to appear, absent good cause, may be a basis for an adverse finding by the Court. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

For Hearing On Defendant Tariq Ayyad'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Continued To Jul-28-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven Marquez, Defendant Propria Persona
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. The parties have stipulated to continuing DEFENDANT TARIQ AYYAD'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment to 07/28/04; SO ORDERED. TARIQ AYYAD, ADONIS ASANTIWA & SEYMOUR JARON ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR IN COURT AT THAT TIME. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-16-2004 Denied

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Joseph Tursi, Esq. for Plaintiff: Seymor Jaron, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: Tariq Ayyad and Share Chive, LLc. as follows:
Past due rent $162,180.61 (The past due rent reflects a credit in the amount of $12,313.14 for the Securtiy Deposit held by plaintiff.)
Holdover Damages of $59,966.85
Attorney's fees of $7,477.50
Costs of $1,496.35
For the total of $231,121.31.
Plaintiff to file dismissal, as to defendant: UNOVO, Inc., before close of business today.
Judgment signed in open court.
